description: Composition Red and black check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a full front button placket, half sleeves, flap pocket on left chest with branding, and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron This Levi's cotton shirt traces a relaxed silhouette flattering all body shapes to make you look your casual best. This off-duty essential is a must-have for the modern urban male. Slip into jeans along with sneakers or suede shoes to complement this trendy-yet-classic shirt. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
